module.name: no-restricted-imports-in-tests
module.description: Disallow configured dependency imports in recognized test files.

scenarios.name: should report default restricted package imports in test files
scenarios.given: import axios from 'axios' inside a .test.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report default restricted Node imports in test files
scenarios.given: import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises' inside a .spec.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: a noRestrictedImportsInTests violation is reported for the fs module root

scenarios.name: should report restricted modules across import-like syntaxes
scenarios.given: require('http'), await import('node:net'), import fs = require('node:fs'), or export * from 'node:worker_threads' inside test files
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import-like node

scenarios.name: should allow restricted imports outside test files
scenarios.given: import fs from 'node:fs' inside a non-test source file
scenarios.when: the rule creates listeners for the file
scenarios.then: no listeners are registered and no violation is reported

scenarios.name: should allow unrestricted modules in test files
scenarios.given: import { render } from '@testing-library/react' inside a .test.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should honor custom restricted module options
scenarios.when: the rule resolves options and evaluates imports in a test file
scenarios.then: the configured module roots are trimmed, normalized, deduplicated, and used for matching
